mapper.insert: insert into platform_store_coupon (template_id, market_id, store_gb_department_id, status, source_type, source_biz_id, start_date, stop_date, issued_by_market_user_id, claimed_by_user_id, used_by_user_id, used_bill_id, used_at, locked_checkout_token, locked_payment_id) values (#{templateId}, #{marketId}, #{storeGbDepartmentId}, #{status}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceBizId}, #{startDate}, #{stopDate}, #{issuedByMarketUserId}, #{claimedByUserId}, #{usedByUserId}, #{usedBillId}, #{usedAt}, #{lockedCheckoutToken}, #{lockedPaymentId})
